user.title: Connecter Leapmotor
user.description: Sets up Leapmotor vehicle data. App certificate and app private key are required for login; paste or upload them here, or place them as app_cert.pem and app_key.pem in /config/leapmotor first. The vehicle PIN is optional; without it only read-only data works, not remote control. ABRP live data is optional; use your ABRP Generic token from the ABRP vehicle live-data setup. Unofficial integration: use at your own risk; no liability for account restrictions, API changes, or vehicle consequences.

data.scan_interval: Intervalle de mise a jour en minutes

init.title: Options Leapmotor
init.description: Change certificate material, vehicle PIN, update interval, and optional ABRP live-data forwarding. App certificate/private key are required for login and are stored as /config/leapmotor/app_cert.pem and /config/leapmotor/app_key.pem. Without a PIN, remote-control actions remain disabled.

data.scan_interval: Intervalle de mise a jour en minutes

certificates.title: Certificats Leapmotor
certificates.description: Upload the required app certificate and private key, or paste their PEM contents. They are stored locally as /config/leapmotor/app_cert.pem and /config/leapmotor/app_key.pem and are not included in the public repository.

account.title: Connecter le compte Leapmotor
account.description: Saisissez vos identifiants Leapmotor. Le PIN vehicule est optionnel; sans lui seules les donnees lecture fonctionnent.

data.scan_interval: Intervalle de mise a jour en minutes

error.account_cert_error: La connexion a reussi, mais le certificat du compte n'a pas pu etre ouvert.
error.cannot_connect: Connexion ou mise a jour API echouee.
error.missing_app_cert: Missing app certificate/private key. Paste both PEM values or place app_cert.pem and app_key.pem in /config/leapmotor.
error.certificate_import_error: Echec import certificat. Verifiez le certificat PEM et la cle privee.

App certificate/private key are required for login and are stored as /config/leapmotor/app_cert.pem and /config/leapmotor/app_key.pem. Without a PIN, remote-control actions remain disabled.
